card.macro_tooltip: Macro KPI: groups several individual KPIs under a common parent indicator. Its result is the weighted average of its child KPIs.

actions.close_period_title_active: Close KPI in the selected period
actions.close_period_title_inactive: Select a period to close the KPI

dialogs.delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete KPI "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated assignments.
dialogs.delete_error_msg: Error deleting KPI. Make sure it has no associated assignments.
dialogs.close_period_msg: Close KPI "{{name}}" in {{period}}? This will close all its assignments in that period.
dialogs.close_period_error: Error closing the KPI in the period.

api_errors.delete_forbidden: You do not have permission to delete this KPI.
api_errors.delete_in_use: The KPI cannot be deleted because it has linked assignments.
api_errors.close_period_required: Select a period to close the KPI.

empty.no_data_subtitle: A KPI is the indicator you will measure: monthly sales, resolved tickets, NPS, delivery compliance, etc.
empty.no_data_hint_pre: Before creating KPIs make sure you have at least one area configured in

form.description_placeholder: Describe the KPI and how it is measured...
form.type_hint: Manual to start without integrations. Count/Ratio/SLA/Value are automated once the criteria is stable.
form.macro_hint: If this KPI is part of a broader indicator, select the parent KPI that groups it. The parent's result is the weighted average of its children.
form.periods_hint: Select the periods where this KPI will be active.
form.scope_weights_hint: Define the KPI weight by area. This value is pre-loaded in Assignments and can be adjusted per person.
form.criteria_placeholder: Describe how this KPI is calculated (formulas, rules, etc.)
form.formula_hint: If left empty, the default formula for the KPI type will be used.
